[PDF_PAGE 161 | score=33] OTHLORX The othlorx are variations of the standard dragons that appear in the world of Krynn. Physically they are identical to the existing dragon forms- brass, bronze, copper, and silver; black, blue, green, white, and red-though there are no gold othlorx. The difference is in their attitudes toward the world and other dragons. The othlorx are part of the outcome of a choice faced by dragon- kind, the choice created by Takhisis and the Wars of the Lance. When Takhisis released the evil dragons into Krynn, she expected all of her children (as she saw them) to come and fight at her side. [PDF_PAGE 78 | score=5] S OUTHERN H OSK The villages of the bakali are simple af- fairs. Although the bakali are amphib- ians, they build their homes on dry land, usually a low hummock or steep river- bank. When sited on a hummock, the village is a collection of simple reed huts, only about four feet tall. Inside, the floor is dug out into a two-stage pit.
